name: Bespoke Extracts, Inc.
business: Bespoke Extracts, Inc. owns, manufactures, and distributes a portfolio of cannabis consumer packaged goods brands including pre-rolled marijuana cigarettes (pre-rolls) and provides processing services for licensed cultivators and dispensaries. The company sells its products to licensed marijuana dispensaries across Colorado.

exposures.sentence: Currently, Bespoke owns, manufactures, and distributes a portfolio of cannabis consumer packaged goods brands including Fresh Joints, Doobskis, DutchBlunts, and Wee Joints, to licensed marijuana dispensaries across Colorado.
